title: How Much Cost
excerpt: How much does it cost to set up Monday.com with 5 workspaces, 10 boards, and 18 users?

posts.author: MarceloR (Marcelo Romualdo)
posts.cookedHtml: How much does it cost to set up Monday.com with 5 workspaces, 10 boards, and 18 users?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Marcelo, our pricing depends on a few factors: the number of users you’d like to add to your account, the features you need, and your billing cycle (monthly/yearly).

For more details about the different type of plans and the features included, check out this article: How does plan and product pricing work?

You can also see the cost of the plan you decide on from our pricing page – monday.com/pricing.
